name: resolve-pr-comments
description: Respond to and resolve unresolved pull-request review comments — a high-reasoning orchestrator delegates all GitHub work to Haiku workers. Handles reviewer feedback; it does not perform code reviews.

github_pat.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_pat.description: Dedicated PAT for this plugin's Haiku github-worker. Fine-grained: Metadata = Read, Pull requests = Read & write. Stored in your OS keychain — never in settings.json or a shared env var.
